heroHeadline: Colombia and Venezuela Hold Key Diplomatic Talks in Post-Maduro Visit
heroSubtitle: Maduro inaugurated for third term (Jan 2025) despite disputed July 2024 election; González recognized by US/EU; 7.9M displaced; PDVSA output recovering from historic lows
footerNote: Data sourced from UN, OAS, IACHR, OFAC, Reuters, AP, BBC, Efecto Cocuyo, Foro Penal, HRW, Amnesty International, ENCOVI, IMF, World Bank, and PDVSA official records.
